activation_rehearsal_references.description: Reviewer-visible rehearsal note for comparing fixture-only replay inputs.

post_activation_smoke_scenarios.expected_result: The simulated response remains blocked unless reviewer attendance and source freshness checks are present.

source_freshness_precheck_rows.expected_status: freshness check required before any future activation decision

agent_facing_response_probes.expected_response: Ask for missing or stale facts and cite the inactive guardrail bundle.

rollback_trigger_observations.observation: Any changed official-source hash keeps the replay inactive until reviewed.

monitoring_signal_expectations.expectation: Report changed public-source hashes and affected guardrail bundles.
